name: Spiritual Circuit Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Ayodhya, Prayagraj, Varanasi with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Rajghat
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Rajghat(Gandhi Cremation place), India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra (250 KM
itinerary.description: Agra (250 KM. Approx. 3 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Agra En-Route to visit Mathura and Vrindavan. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, after breakfast, proceed to visit the Taj Mahal, Agra fort, Itimad aulah
itinerary.description: Today, after breakfast, proceed to visit the Taj Mahal, Agra fort, Itimad aulah (Baby Taj). Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Ayodhya (500 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Ayodhya (500 Kms. 8 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Ayodhya & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Ayodhya Sightseeing: Today, after breakfast, proceed to visit the city of Lord R
itinerary.description: Ayodhya Sightseeing: Today, after breakfast, proceed to visit the city of Lord Rama to see The Saryu River, Hanuman Garhi, Ram Janam Bhumi, Kanak Bhawan & Treta Ka Thakur. Check in at the hotel & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Ayodhya to Prayagraj (225 kMS
itinerary.description: Ayodhya to Prayagraj (225 kMS. 5 Hrs.): After breakfast proceed to Prayagraj & visit Holi Triveni Sangam, Hanuman Temple, Anand Bhawan & Alopi Devi Temple. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Prayagraj to Varanasi (120 Kms
itinerary.description: Prayagraj to Varanasi (120 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Prayagraj & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Varanasi sightseeing: Early morning visit the popular ghat of Ganges through boa
itinerary.description: Varanasi sightseeing: Early morning visit the popular ghat of Ganges through boat ride of Varanasi, peoples offering water to Sun God along with taking a holy dip in the Ganges river water, back to hotel & after breakfast proceed to visit Bharat Mata temple, Vishwanath Temple, Sankat Mochan (Hanuman Temple), Annapurna Temple, Banaras Hindu University (BHEU) & Manas Mandir & Sarnath. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Varanasi Departure Transfer: Today after breakfast, proceed to Varanasi airport/
itinerary.description:
Varanasi Departure Transfer: Today after breakfast, proceed to Varanasi airport/railway station & drop you with sweet memories.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Driver Allowance, Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
Comfortable vehicles AC with driver
AC NOT OPERATE ON HILLY AREA
Exclusions
Meals other than those specif

seo.title: Spiritual Circuit Tour | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book Spiritual Circuit Tour with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Delhi, Agra, Ayodhya, Prayagraj, Varanasi tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
